points="400,80;400,120" startNodeId="N1" startPosition="3"/> <line endNodeId="N23" endPosition="1" id="L22" points="400,160;400,200" startNodeId="N2" startPosition="3"/> <line condition="1 == 1" disCondition="1 == 1" endNodeId="N26" endPosition="1" id="L29" points="460,240;600,240;600,260" priority="1" startNodeId="N23" startPosition="2"/> <line condition="$fd_3dccbb68567f0c$ .equals("2") && ($fd_3c4893a8c5f55a$ .equals("4") || $fd_3c4893a8c5f55a$ .equals("5") || $fd_3c4893a8c5f55a$ .equals("6") || $fd_3c4893a8c5f55a$ .equals("7") || $fd_3c4893a8c5f55a$ .equals("8")) " disCondition="$申请类别$ .equals("2") && ($进入一、二、三号门申请人类型$ .equals("4") || $进入一、二、三号门申请人类型$ .equals("5") || $进入一、二、三号门申请人类型$ .equals("6") || $进入一、二、三号门申请人类型$ .equals("7") || $进入一、二、三号门申请人类型$ .equals("8")) " endNodeId="N28" endPosition="1" id="L36" name="合作企业进入一、二三号门" points="340,240;280,240;280,420" priority="0" startNodeId="N23" startPosition="4"/> <line condition="1 == 1" disCondition="1 == 1" endNodeId="N39" endPosition="1" id="L33" name="上电" points="540,300;480,340" priority="1" startNodeId="N26" startPosition="4"/> <line condition="$字符串.包含$($docCreator$.getFdParentsName("/"), "上海电气电站设备有限公司发电机厂")" disCondition="$字符串.包含$($申请人$.getFdParentsName("/"), "上海电气电站设备有限公司发电机厂")" endNodeId="N36" endPosition="1" id="L34" name="上发" points="660,300;760,340" priority="0" startNodeId="N26"
